Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights
Off Calendar Oct-23-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS, LLC's Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Petitioner's petition for approval for transfer of payment rights, which is unopposed, is GRANTED.

Judge: Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

***After hearing, an order is signed.
